title: Just Enough Tools
description: This mod adds a bunch of tool sets from different vanilla materials, such as copper, amethyst, quartz and more!
body:
# New stuff 
****JET adds a lot of tools from vanilla resources.****

 *Right now we have:*
1. Amethyst tools
2. Copper tools
3. Emerald tools
4. Lapis Lazuli tools
5. Quartz tools
6. Prismarine tools

And that's just 1.0!
# Why choose JET?
**Just Enough Tools adds a variety of tools from vanilla materials, which makes the gameplay more fun and interesting. Without adding anything else, it adds a lot of useful tools.**
# Note
Personally, I couldn't load the neoforge version, so I highly recommend the fabric one.
